features.name: class inheritance with extends
features.description: Code should include a class inheritance declaration using extends keyword where a derived class inherits from a base class

features.name: super_new_call_in_derived_constructor
features.description: Code should include a derived class constructor that calls super.new() to initialize the base class

features.name: string_member_assignment_after_super_new
features.description: Code should include a derived class that modifies a string member inherited from the base class after calling super.new()
